GenAiFunction.description: FULL POST-VISIT WORKFLOW: Call this when documenting a clinic/hospital visit with visit log creation as the PRIMARY operation. THIS ACTION handles: (1) CREATE VISIT LOG (REQUIRED) - Documents what was discussed, attendees, outcomes, referral opportunities. (2) CREATE FOLLOW-UP TASK (optional) - If user mentions action items ("call them", "follow up"). WHEN TO USE: "Log my visit to Apollo Hospitals with Dr. Mehta - discussed oncology program and future partnership opportunities. Also create a follow-up task to call them on Tuesday." REQUIRED INPUTS: Clinic/hospital name + visit summary (what was discussed). OPTIONAL INPUTS: Doctor name, referral notes, expense tracking, follow-up actions. OUTPUTS: Visit log ID (CRM record), task ID (if created), success message.
